DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS DAISY JIMENEZ, ARACELIA AGUILAR'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE IS GRANTED AS TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, 16, AND IS LIMITED TO DOCUMENTS FROM THE ENGINEERING DEPARTMENT. calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-20-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-04-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2018 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Rodney Gi, Strategic Legal Practices, apperaing for plaintiff Daisy Jimenez, Telephone 310-929-4900;
Micah A Yospe, Attorney at Law, appearing for Defendant, Hyundai Motor America, Telephone 415-875-4367

Ruling: The matter is argued in open court. Tentative ruling is confirmed with modifications. PLAINTIFFS DAISY JIMENEZ, ARACELIA AGUILAR'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is granted as to request for production, 16, and is limited to documents from the engineering department. Request for production 22 is granted. The motion is denied as to other request for production 27, 30, and 33. Defendant to respond and produce documents within 20 days of entry of the Protective Order. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge Pro Tem: Stephanie Krmpotic; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2018 Set For Trial On Jan-07-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
